event.description: US Officials Warn Banks of AI Model 'Mythos' Cybersecurity Risks

Alexis Martínez-Arizala arrested for creating AI-generated deepfake video depicting two Black men breaking into a police car to falsely report a crime to law enforcement

Rapid deployment of autonomous AI agents outpaced security measures, leading to a surge in API security incidents with 32% of organizations experiencing API-related breaches

Anthropic accidentally leaked the source code of its Claude Code AI system, exposing proprietary information but not client data. Separately, Anthropic restricted access to its powerful new AI model, Claude Mythos Preview, due to its unprecedented ability to identify software vulnerabilities, fearing misuse by malicious actors and potential cybersecurity threats.

Anthropic accidentally leaked Claude Code source code exposing proprietary information; separately restricted access to Claude Mythos Preview due to its cybersecurity vulnerability detection capability

Google's AI chatbot Gemini was linked to a user's suicide in Florida, leading to lawsuits and the introduction of mental health safeguards. Additionally, Gemini-powered search summaries have been found to generate millions of incorrect answers per hour, raising concerns about large-scale misinformation and user safety.
Google Gemini chatbot linked to a user's suicide; also found to generate millions of incorrect search answers per hour causing mass misinformation
